━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡HOTFIX!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v6.1.0] —  April 3, 2026  🚀

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Added "Copy Image" feature ( @boost7005 )
+ Added "Save Image" feature
+ Beta testing for an auto typer (check it out from the dropdown menu inside of the app

Universal 🟡
+ Entire app is now C based, should improve performance, however further improvements coming in future updates
+ Testing out some new logos 🤔 
+ Fixed app hang when closing custom screen recorder ( @razer_7898 )
+ Added support for mouse wheel in remote access tool ( @null )


News: Some chud decided to try and report us to our registrar, luckily their head office is like 3 streets away from us, so I popped in and explained the situation, and the website was up again a day later, good try though Justin  😉

YAWN.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡HOTFIX!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v6.0.2] — March 27, 2026  🚀

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Added support math Math and Physics text using KaTex ( @poopyheadwarrior )
+ CMD window popping up should be fully fixed

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Fixed Overlay sometimes flashing once when hiding it ( @princetdm )

Universal 🟡
+ Fixed updater sometimes using old file

(This hotfix is just to fix a few bugs before the next big update)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v6.0.1] — March 27, 2026  🚀

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Fixed false MITM detection
+ API keys can now not be stolen by simple copy pasting  from inside the app (like if someone had remote access)
+ Added feature to first test your API key, to make sure it works
+ Added audio recording feature that can be sent to the AI ( @null ) 

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Custom text color selector for Dark Mode and Light mode ( @xwhize )

Universal 🟡
+ **ADDED OFFLINE MODE!**
+ A built in screen recorder, for if you want to make make cheating videos, or share the exam afterwards with other people ( @null )
+ Completely fixed the app sometimes not starting (finally found the root cause)

ALSO, a hotfix will be coming out tomorrow for the CMD window popping up, and BYOK for Evadus Core!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v6.0.0] — March 25, 2026  🚀

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**V6 IS HERE BOYS!**

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Bring your API Key, available for everyone, **even if you don't have a subscription!**
+ Integrated AI chat can now be used for **free** with BYOK
+ Added opacity slider for the overlay ( @xwhize, I think, can't remember who exactly)
+ Fixed CMD window popping up ( @.smurf3 )
+ *Massively* improved startup time for the Virtual Environment
+ Fixed hotkeys that would sometimes not work
+ Server will fallback to our API keys if yours don't work

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Fixed hotkeys that would sometimes not get registered with invalid hotkeys ( @null )
+ Free BYOK coming to Evadus Core next!

Universal 🟡
+ Refresh Token json file is now encrypted, and encryption is unique to each user (if your PC ever gets infected by malware they won't be able to steal anything)
+ API key file is encrypted with the same security ^
+ Added button to logout if the app hangs ( @null )

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v5.3.1] — March 22, 2026  🚀

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Added feature to use Integrated AI chat whilst you're busy with an exam, without needing to tab out
+ Added mouse button support for hotkeys
+ Added more hidden processes, like Snipping Tool and Anti-glare film ( @boost7005 )
+ Improved self-diagnostic section, with a step by step silver bullet fix

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Added hotkey to instantly take a screenshot and get an answer ( @.smurf3 )

Universal 🟡
+ **We now have an in-app updater, so you no longer need to use the separate file for updates**
+ Fixed Copy buttons not working for Room details ( @al_bpl_60968 )
+ Requires much less bandwidth with no resolution sacrifices ( @al_bpl_60968 )

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Added custom snipping tool to Integrated AI Chat ( @null - @yippie1111 )
+ Added Light and Dark Mode toggler ( @johnwide1.  )
+ Added Opacity Slider ( @johnwide1. )

( This is not the big Evadus+ update I've been talking about, still coming don't worry)

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Added feature to use mouse buttons as hotkeys ( @nohacksjustgfuel )
+ Completely undetectable mouse button hotkeys (pretty hard but i got it working flawlessly)
+ Fixed Light mode text sometimes still being White

Installer ⚪
+ Fixed bug that prevent changing your username in the app (could still change it from the website, just a bit annoying)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v5.2.4] — March 18, 2026  🚀

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Universal 🟡
+ Added support for 4k monitors and smaller ones ( @heyhey_30022 )
+ Perfect app stability, shutdowns and startups, massively improved performance on lower end systems
+ UI overhaul finished, everything is now consistent with the website

This update is just to fix some small quirks with different size displays and different versions of Windows 10, app will now be incredibly fast, and much more stable.

Before the major upcoming Evadus+ update, I wanted to make sure the app is 100% optimized, now that it's ready, we can really start with some major improvements.

Stay Tuned!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Added more apps to hidden processes ( @null )
+ C++ based loader, greatly improving latency and compatibility
+ Custom Targets saved to disk ( @josh_53521 )
+ Logs folder to investigate failures, helping us bypass your proctor faster
+ RDP diagnostic section, to easily debug why RDP wrapper isn't working on your system ( @null )

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Overlay resizing for smaller displays ( @noobmaster1230539 )

Universal 🟡
+ **COMPLETE UI OVERHAUL!**
+ **Much** faster app boot, shutdown and runtime
+ Optional uninstall for RDP Wrapper, making it no longer necessary to setup a PC after an update


**We have a very big Evadus+ update planned, stay tuned!**

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Fixed bug that would cause integrated AI chat to show Invalid credentials
+ Added Zoom.exe and others to Hidden processes ( @justinsun._. & @null )
+ Fixed keyboard layout assumption by the Integrated AI chat, now uses the host layout system

Universal 🟡
+ **NEW CUSTOM & UNDETECTABLE REMOTE ACCESS SOFTWARE!**
- Me and @null did some testing last night, works beautifully.
You can now use our Remote Control software instead of tools like Ultraviewer, TeamViewer and more, it's all integrated into the Evadus app you already have, and it's impossible to detect, unlike mainstream tools.

Installer ⚪
+ Optional Windows Defender Exclusion install ( @null )

+ Bypasses all monitor check ( @_abcxyz0002 , let me know if it works for you )

Evadus Core 🔵

⚪ Main app
+ Added resizing for smaller and larger screen to account for DPI scaling ( @null )
+ Fixed username displaying without formatting in "My Account"
+ Automatically refreshes token if a connection drop happened whilst refreshing the token ( Caused Invalid credentials errors )

Evadus Core 🔵

⚪ Updater

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Fixed Respondus bug that would detect Gesture swipes
+ Fixed bug that would bleed through cursor for 3ms
+ Removed purple border when in fullscreen mode
+ Fully Undetectable hotkeys ( @rambo9076286 )
+ Hotkey customizer ( @null  )
+ Dynamic hotkey display in the RDP window and Title bar

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Fixed Fullscreen bug sometimes not locking the cursor (Now works perfectly and reliably for in person exams)
+ Fixed PearsonVue bug requiring you to start monitoring after starting the app
+ Much better stability and consistency for 32- and 64 bit apps, much more universal now
+ Fully bypasses VMAware and all it's checks

Evadus Core 🔵

content:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v4.4.0] — February 28, 2026  🚀

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Fixed bug that would no correctly bound the cursor to the RDP feed
+ MASSIVE speed and security improvements
+ Stealth improvements, future proofing against potential detection improvements by proctors
+ Fixed "Remote Audio" showing up, you can now use your real Audio hardware, completely undetectable (check settings modal)
+ New window resizing mechanics, much more user-friendly

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Fixed Lag when generating large bodies of text
+ Removed Gemini 3 Pro Preview (Google is disabling the API in a week)
+ Automatic auto scroller
+ Fixed Gemini 3.1 Pro not showing up for Premium Users inside the Overlay

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v4.3.2] — February 24, 2026  🚀

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Added feature to overlay windows on top of RDP window when in fullscreen
+ Removed bar showing up when in fullscreen when moving your mouse to the top of the screen
+ Added hotkey to instantly **EXIT** fullscreen and unlock RDP window ( @xaraye_50915 ) [Ctrl+Alt+F]
+ Added hotkey to instantly **ENTER** fullscreen and lock RDP window ( @xaraye_50915 ) [Ctrl+Alt+F]

This is a huge step forward for Evadus+ if you're writing in person exams, it'll allow you to instantly hide your cheat material/tools with just one hotkey.

Make sure to set your RDP resolution to the same resolution as your monitor in the settings.

Check out the latest update to see what I'm talking about!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Added Stealth Feature, hides EVERYTHING in the overlay except the AI's answer, perfect for 2 camera exams ( @jackguar )
+ Added Formatting for Matrix math equations ( @_abcxyz0002 )
+ Removed blank space at the bottom of the Settings modal
+ Increased file upload limit to 100KB (Unlimited Plans)

⚪ Updater
+ Fixed updater, you can download the new one from this URL https://updater.evadus.wtf/Evadus_Updater.exe

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡NEW UPDATE!  💡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

                  🚀 [v4.3.0] — February 23, 2026  🚀  (2 huge updates in one day I'm the fuckin goat)

Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Evadus+ 🟣
+ Changed window title from "Evadus+" to "Secure Exam Window" ( @null ) 
+ Refactored settings modal to remove blank space at the bottom
+ Added tooltip to better understand how the new Monitoring system works

Evadus Core 🔵
+ Fixed bug making Screensharing show a black screen
+ Fixed Screensharing chat messages not appearing in Evadus Core overlay
+ Added feature to upload files to AI models ( @299792458  ) [Unlimited plans]
+ Fixed Audio recording bug, Voice messages now fully supported
+ Added Equalizer settings to microphone to help with low-quality mics
+ Added sound check feature to see how your audio sounds

⚪ Website
+ Restyled Screenshare page to look the same as the rest of the website

@everyone, IF YOU HAVE SUGGESTIONS FOR NEW FEATURES AND IMPROVEMENTS, POST THEM IN <#1383790437130702909>, I READ THEM ALL!

- Launch in Fullscreen

Evadus+ 🟣

Evadus Core 🔵

          🚀 [v1.2.9] — August 30, 2025 🚀

    Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Evadus+ 🟣
+ Fully ACPI tables spoof:
   - DSDT, HPET, FACM, MCFG etc.
+ Powershell network bug fixed
+ Troubleshooting guide inside the app, as well as prerequisites
+ Custom BIOS/Firmware
+ Mouse button release feature for grabbing ( @xaraye_50915  )

If you use Evadus+ for Respondus (I know who they are so don't lie), react to this message with an emoji to get an extra 3 weeks, as compensation for the downtime.

To install this new update, navigate to the install directory of Evadus, and delete the "Virtual_Machine" folder. Then launch the app again, and you will see the pop up to download the VM installer, download it again.

We will also be working on an automatic updater for the Virtual Machine, coming soon.

This update also requires you to update the main app, but that's easy.

📌 Current Priority List (in order):
> Custom GPU Drivers and more for Evadus+

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡  NEW UPDATE!  💡 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

          🚀 [v1.2.1] — August 25, 2025 🚀

    Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Evadus 🔵
+ Fixed bug that would massively delay the rapid fire thoughts and detailed answer
+ Less & faster network communications
+ Speed optimizations in server
+ Fixed bug that would force down the shift key

The bug that would force down the shift key seems to fixed on my end, however if anyone still experiences it, please let me know.

📌 Current Priority List (in order):
> Custom Firmware and ACPI tables for Evadus+ (Respondus patch)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡  NEW UPDATE!  💡 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

          🚀 [v1.1.8] — August 24, 2025 🚀

    Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Evadus Lite 🟢
+ Implented hooks that will prevent any cursor changes when using the browser, HUGE stealth upgrade
+ Automatic toggler for screenshot section, removed the manual one

Evadus 🔵
+ Thinner scrollbar for Evadus Overlay
+ Fixed controls section hotkey toggle bug
+ Fixed bug that would force a logout on internet connection loss

Evadus+ 🟣
+ Added a loading mechanism for refreshing the USB List
+ Removed console window that would pop up when starting the VM
+ Fixed powershell network setup script that would sometimes require a manual restart
+ Inverted the fallback and primary method for setting up the TAP adapter, since the primary was failing most times forcing the backup method, causing most users to think it was a critical error


📌 Current Priority List (in order):
> Full stealth implementation for the Evadus+ Virtual Machine. This update will be enough to be called a "V2", and will easily make it the best cheating Virtual Machine ever.
> Server-to-host connection method overhaul for the Evadus app.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡  NEW UPDATE!  💡 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

          🚀 [v1.1.7] — August 21, 2025 🚀

    Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Evadus 🔵
+ Scrollbar  for rapid fire thoughts
Evadus+ 🟣
+ Custom USB server implemented (unlimted & faster USB device passthroughs, not detectable)
+ Improved resistance to RDTSC attacks
+ Upgraded to a 256GB Drive (still the same file size locally, however looks more believable inside the VM)
+ TAP Connection instead of Bridge (faster, more compatible and less setup)
+ Auto save feature for selecting resources (RAM and Cores)
+ Auto save feature for selecting USB devices to passthrough

To passthrough a USB device, you can know select them from inside the Evadus app, no longer inside of the VM itself. You can also select as many as you want.

To install this new update, navigate to the install directory of Evadus, and delete the "Virtual_Machine" folder. Then launch the app again, and you will see the pop up to download the VM installer, download it again.

We will also be working on an automatic updater for the Virtual Machine, coming soon.

📌 Current Priority List (in order):
> Server-to-host connection method overhaul, slow connections from the Evadus app to the server. The current setup is very poorly optimized, and causes a multitude of different problems, which aren't acceptable.
> Quality of life updates in the Evadus app, such as no longer forcing a logout if internet connection is lost or automatically restarting the VM if it crashes

Thank you for everyone that has been signing up and buying credits, we are currently sitting at exactly 99 users, can't wait for what lies ahead.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡  NEW UPDATE!  💡 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

          🚀 [v1.1.6] — August 16, 2025 🚀

    Improvements •  Fixes •  Optimizations

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🟣 **Evadus+**
> Complete cursor passthrough rework (Stealthier)
> -5GB File size (Smaller)
> Bridged connection, no longer relying on host (Faster), also improves webcam performance

We are currently working on our own USB passthrough server, since the current one has limitations on how many you can passthrough. Will announce once the update is ready. This update is meant to fix some issues that people were experiencing.

To install this new update, navigate to install directory of Evadus, and delete the "Virtual_Machine" folder. Then launch the app again, and you will see the pop up to download the VM installer, download it again.

There is one additional setup step needed, I will be making a new video for Evadus+ shortly.
